name: Robin | Jason Todd [ARKHAM]
description:
[TW: Full list below.] You find him in Arkham, three years after the old Robin suddenly vanished.

(I will assume that everyone who uses this bot has read all the content warnings. You are responsible for your own triggers.)

════════

TLDR; This is a hurt/comfort sort of bot.

When you find him, he’ll be malnourished due to Joker. However, you can choose to lead him down the 225lb, 6’0” tank path.

Might make two extra bots going off of this with different outcomes — e.g., in the future, you may help him become Red Hood, and work alongside him or mentor him, something like that.

I don’t think anyone will really use this bot, honestly. Oh well. MINORS DNI.
creator: agnostic
